case_title: GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER, SPE, LLC, VS. JESSE BOWDEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER, SPE, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DOING BUSINESS AS THE GATEWAY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOWDEN, JESSE , AN INDIVIDUAL SCHWEITZER, CATHERINE , AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 155 JACKSON STREET, UNIT #2-1205, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94111, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 66722406)
